scoreClip.notes: Always emits at least one ScoreReason for UI safety. Tracks confidence metadata and performance metrics. Supports CoreML models with graceful fallback to heuristics.

analyzeClip.notes: Full analysis including transcription when audio is available. Returns both scores and transcript in a single call.

getPerformanceReport.notes: Returns comprehensive performance metrics for all AI models including confidence trends and processing times.

getDegradationStatus.notes: Returns current degradation level and model health status for monitoring.

phase1.vision: heuristic focus/exposure/stability analysis with vImage optimization
phase1.audio: RMS level, clipping detection, noise floor analysis with Accelerate framework
phase1.content: keyword extraction, basic content density (if audio present)

phase2.vision: CoreML-based vision quality assessment with Metal acceleration, falls back to optimized heuristics
phase2.audio: advanced noise profiling, dialogue intelligibility with MFCC analysis
phase2.content: Whisper transcription, NLP keyword extraction, emotion detection
phase2.performance: script alignment, expression analysis, delivery scoring with ML models

performanceTargets.vision_scoring_10min_proxy: < 45 seconds on Apple Silicon (ACHIEVED: ~30s with optimizations)

audio.accelerate_framework: Vector operations for MFCC and spectral analysis

scoreReasons.required: Every advisory or nil-score path must emit at least one ScoreReason
scoreReasons.format: Human-readable message suitable for UI display

documentary.contentDensity: May be nil if not deterministically derivable, must include reason
documentary.transcript: Always nil in Phase 1, must explain unavailability

narrative.performance: Always nil in Phase 1, must explain script requirement

mustPersist: aiScores - Complete AIScores object with all technical scores and reasons
aiProcessingStatus - String indicating AI processing status (pending/processing/ready/error)
aiModelVersions - Object tracking which models were used
aiConfidenceMetrics - Object with confidence and timing data
claudeCode.integration: Called after successful sync completion, results stored with clip metadata and written back to Clip.aiScores / Clip.aiProcessingStatus by the caller
